summary: Phase 3 - Marketplace + Service UX Testing Complete. 14/14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all key features. Fixed bug in CountrySelectorModal where Coming Soon country redirect was interrupted by onDone callback.
seed_data_creation: Created test requests during testing (TEST_Phase3_*, TEST_Playwright_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 151 tested Phase 3 Marketplace + Service UX. All features verified: 1) ServicePageTemplate renders with Hero, Includes, ForWho, Process, FAQ, CTA sections. 2) Service page 'Request a Quote' button navigates to /request-quote?type=service_quote&service=<slug>. 3) No inline forms on service detail pages (only CTA buttons). 4) Public marketplace loads 41 products from /api/marketplace/products/search. 5) Marketplace shows Quote button for guest users, no Order button. 6) Quote button navigates to /request-quote?type=product_bulk. 7) Country selector shows Tanzania as 'Available' and others as 'Coming Soon'. 8) Coming Soon countries redirect to /launch-country?country=XX (fixed bug). 9) Tanzania shows region selection (Dar es Salaam, Arusha, Mwanza, Dodoma). 10) /request-quote page accepts type=service_quote, product_bulk, business_pricing. 11) Quote submission creates request in backend (verified via API). 12) Admin login works. 13) Requests inbox API returns requests. 14) CRM leads API returns leads.

SERVICE_PAGE_TEMPLATE.details: ServicePageTemplate renders Hero, Includes, ForWho, Process, FAQ, CTA sections

SERVICE_CTA_NAVIGATION.details: Request a Quote button navigates to /request-quote?type=service_quote&service=<slug>

NO_INLINE_FORMS.details: No form elements found on service detail page

MARKETPLACE_QUOTE_BUTTON.details: Quote button visible for guest users

MARKETPLACE_NO_ORDER_BUTTON.details: Order button NOT visible for guest users

COUNTRY_SELECTOR_COMING_SOON.details: Kenya, Uganda, Rwanda, Ghana, Nigeria, SA show 'Coming Soon'

COMING_SOON_REDIRECT.details: Coming Soon countries redirect to /launch-country?country=XX (fixed bug)

TANZANIA_REGIONS.details: Tanzania shows Dar es Salaam, Arusha, Mwanza, Dodoma regions

QUOTE_SUBMISSION.details: Quote submission creates request in backend

bug_fixed.issue: Coming Soon country redirect was interrupted by onDone callback which triggered page reload
bug_fixed.fix: Removed onDone() call before navigate() for coming_soon countries

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is MOCKED - logged to email_logs collection, not actually dispatched. Requires Resend integration for production.
